artPrompt: The frantic instant of a recount: a goblin frozen mid-shout pointing wildly at a teetering stack of permanents while rival hands scramble to count their own piles, coins and dice flying in the election-night chaos. A single bonfire blast lights the panicked faces and outstretched claws, the rioting square dissolving into night-black smoke. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Recount
text:
Each player counts the permanents they control out loud, at the same time, as fast as they can. Whoever finishes first and is not wrong gains control of the most recently cast spell.
If two players tie, they must instead settle it with one round of rock-paper-scissors. No best of three. Democracy is fast and cruel.
flavorText: "I demand a recount!" — every goblin, eventually
